analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Can you pls disconnect this from google

cause_analysis.narrative: Love Brows churned on 2026-03-31 after 215 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 24 times, but the client only replied 1. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.

messages.body: Hi, thank you for calling Love Browse.
Request Closed
Hi Nam,   Your Zoca subscription has been cancelled as per your request.  We are sorry to see you go. If you ever want to give it another try or have any questions, we are always here to help.

Before we proceed to make any changes, we would love to connect with you quickly to make sure this is the best path forward for your business. Could you let us know a good time to give you a call? We want to make sure you have all the information you need before any changes are made.
